rows.label: qev086505_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oi oi oi! What this?
Who this? Who are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0002
rows.name: Tatsu is Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0003
rows.name:
Tatsu is friend of humans and comes
as emissary with important treaty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0004
rows.name: You come here as secretary? To do what?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0005
rows.name: Fool! Tatsu clearly say "emissary"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0006
rows.name: Are you the leader of this caravan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oi, yes, Tsumuji is dashing and handsome
head honcho of Dorian Caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0008
rows.name: Tsumuji Honcho...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0009
rows.name:
Mustache man from NLA want
Dorian Caravan to sign treaty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0010
rows.name:
Treaty will form allegiance
between caravan and city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0011
rows.name:
Affirm grievance? Caravan
do something wrong?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0012
rows.name:
No! Allegiance! It just mean Tsumuji
and NLA humans become friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0013
rows.name:
Oi! Tsumuji know what "ally
gents" are! Tsumuji not stupid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0014
rows.name:
Soooo...do you think
maybe you could sign it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0015
rows.name:
That depend on show of goodwill
from friends of Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0016
rows.name: Goodwill?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0017
rows.name: Oi![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0018
rows.name:
Friends want to form brotherhood
with Dorian Caravan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0019
rows.name: Then Tsumuji need contract fee first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0020
rows.name: Fee? How much Tsumuji want?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0021
rows.name: Hmm. Tsumuji settle for...this much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0022
rows.name: Seriously? THAT much?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_JNK0010
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: qev086505_SEL0011
rows.name:
Exclaim that 30,000
credits is way too much.

rows.label: qev086505_JNK0020
rows.name: Comment

rows.label: qev086505_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you expected no less
from a race of merchants.

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0023
rows.name:
That does seem like a lot. Is there any
way you could lower the asking price?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0024
rows.name:
Tsumuji never besmirch honor as
merchant by offering discount.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0025
rows.name:
They view everything in
terms of the bottom line.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0026
rows.name:
Say what you will, but at least
they're honest about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0027
rows.name:
Friends understand! This
make everything easier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0028
rows.name:
If Tsumuji totally honest, this actually
amazing bargain for caravan friendship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0029
rows.name: Meh. Tatsu have no choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0030
rows.name:
Tsumuji wait here. Tatsu and friends
bring cash to purchase friendship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086505_MSG0031
rows.name: Oi! Act now, while supply last![ST:wait ]
